race.comment: CONCORDIA WIND (11) rewarded for her consistency up to the 1600m third-up with a comfortable win at Warwick Farm in BM72 grade. Ready to go to the next level with just the 53.5kg today. Looks to get the right tempo and can win again. THE CREATOR (2) classy miler who gets the right run from the inside draw. Track bias was against him when he savaged the line with a tidy sixth over 1500m at Rosehill. Gets the benefit of Roper's claim and can finish much closer today. SEVEN'S (8) all four runs this time in have been excellent and comes to Randwick for the first time. Can push forward with cover from the gate and play a leading role. CONCHIERO (9) progressing well in easier races with the big weights and ready to show up out to the 1600m. Will roll forward from the wide gate and take catching. COLD BREW (3) building a good winning CV in weaker races and stretches out to the 1600m for the first time here. Not sure where his ceiling is and must be kept safe.
